arts.ttl: Liverpool 4-0 Tottenham (4-1 agg): Match report & 3 talking points as Reds book Wembley trip
arts.sum: Liverpool booked their place in the Carabao Cup final as they beat Tottenham 4-0 at Anfield in the second leg of the sides' last four tie. However, any hopes of a comeback were fully ended when Van Dijk rose highest to nod a corner home, just as he did in winning last season's final in this competition for Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou responds to Jamie Redknapp comments after Anfield 'reality check' against Liverpool
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur were thrashed 4-0 by Liverpool in the second leg of the Carabao Cup semi-final

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends Liverpool message as challenge set for Carabao Cup finalists
arts.sum: Arne Slot is adamant that the League Cup has helped Liverpool's wider success this season

arts.ttl: Was this new low for 'abject' Spurs - and what happened to 'Ange-ball'?
arts.sum: Tottenham's loss to Liverpool was described as "abject", "damaging" and "a disgrace" - so what next for Ange Postecoglou and Spurs?

arts.ttl: Liverpool already have a 'ready-made replacement' if Trent Alexander-Arnold leaves, Ally McCoist insists - as pundits sing Conor Bradley's praises
arts.sum: The Reds defender is out of contract at the end of the season, and there have been strong links with him and Real Madrid after Los Blancos had a bid rejected for him in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool make winning look easy as Slot’s machine rolls on to Wembley | Andy Hunter
arts.sum: The head coach continues his pursuit of four trophies in his first season at Anfield, with Spurs the latest to be dismissed The Tottenham collapse, when it inevitably came, unfolded to Ange Postecoglou’s right. In his peripheral vision as he grimaced behind Liverpool’s second-half onslaught on the Kop goal was a coach who must ignite envy and admiration in every rival. How effortless Arne Slot makes this look. How serenely he has taken to English football, to succeeding a club legend, to reaching a Wembley cup final at the first attempt. How flawed others appear in comparison. A Carabao Cup final appearance eight months into the job can be added to Slot’s extensive list of Anfield achievements after a comfortable semi-final second leg victory over Spurs. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool's silverware desire influenced by mentality
arts.sum: Liverpool defeated Tottenham 4-0 to advance to the Carabao Cup final, as their silverware ambitions continues to heat up.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou bemoans missed opportunity after Tottenham crash out of Carabao Cup - as Spurs boss admits Liverpool 'were too good for us'
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE AT ANFIELD: Postecoglou expressed his frustration and 'disappointment' after his side were beaten 4-0 by Liverpool in their Carabao Cup semi-final second leg.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 4-0 Spurs: Club and personal records set in commanding semi-final victory for Arne Slot's men
arts.sum: Liverpool set another EFL Cup record, while Arne Slot becomes just the second Dutch manager to reach a final following their commanding 4-1 aggregate win over Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Sky pundit makes Tottenham U-turn with heavy criticism with Ange Postecoglou message
arts.sum: "Not having one shot on target in the semi-final second-leg, when you're trying to change the course of your history - I feel sorry for those young players. Jamie Redknapp has criticised Tottenham Hotspur's performance as they slumped to a 4-0 defeat in the Carabao Cup semi-final against Liverpool.
